description_long: This object is a sleek, modern knife or short sword with a predominantly dark metallic body and a lighter metallic strip running along the top edge. The blade is straight and rectangular, with a flat profile and a single-edged design, giving it a tactical, utilitarian appearance. Both sides of the blade feature an engraved or embossed emblem resembling a stylized animal or mythical creature, adding a touch of ornamentation. The handle is integrated into the body, with a subtle ergonomic contour and a small protrusion at the rear, likely for grip or attachment. The overall finish is smooth and slightly glossy, with a hard, durable surface typical of high-quality steel or alloy. The object appears solid and robust, suitable for use in urban environments as a tool or weapon.
description: A modern, straight-edged knife or short sword with a dark metallic body, lighter top strip, and engraved emblem. The design is sleek, robust, and slightly glossy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat, rectangular blade tip and the engraved emblem below the edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the blade, the lighter metallic strip, and the detailed emblem.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the handle end and the small rear protrusion, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the blade's length, metallic strip, and emblem.
attribute_handle_design: integrated, straight, dark metallic, slight ergonomic contour, rear protrusion
attribute_ornamentation: engraved emblem on both sides of the blade
